allow: Bash(git add .gitignore README.md SUMMARY.md FINAL_SUMMARY.md backend/ miniprogram/ src/)
Bash(git add .gitignore README.md SUMMARY.md FINAL_SUMMARY.md miniprogram/ src/ docs/)
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-ChildItem ''C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI'' -Recurse -Filter ''gh.exe'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty FullName")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "if \(Test-Path ""$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe""\) { Write-Output ""$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe"" } else { Write-Output ''Not found'' }")
Bash("/d/Program Files/GitHub CLI/gh.exe" repo view Young625/invoice-miniprogram)
Bash("/d/Program Files/GitHub CLI/gh.exe" repo view Young625/invoice-miniprogram --json defaultBranchRef,name)
Bash(git tag -a v0.1.0 -m "Initial release: Invoice Management MiniProgram:*)
Bash("/d/Program Files/GitHub CLI/gh.exe" release create v0.1.0 --title "v0.1.0 - Initial Release" --notes "## 🎉 首次发布:*)
Bash(git add README.md LICENSE CHANGELOG.md backend/tests/ backend/pytest.ini)
Bash(git tag -a v0.2.0 -m "Release v0.2.0: Enhanced Services and Deployment:*)
